Edit JoRap garden notes at /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com

Read data/levels-batch-3.json (43 notes). For EACH slug:

In content/english/notes/{slug}.md, update `key_concept:`:
1. Keep bullet 1 unchanged.
2. REMOVE current bullet 2 (plain simplification).
3. INSERT Level 1-5 with prefix "Level N: ".
4. Keep bullets 3+ unchanged.
5. Preserve bible shortcodes after first bullet only.

Levels: 1=grade6, 2=grade8, 3=grade10, 4=adult, 5=nuance.
No contractions. No blank lines between key_concept bullets.

ALL 43 notes. Return count and skips.
